title: eremophila glabra
intro: Eremophila glabra, also known as the Furry Emu Bush or Naked Emu Bush, is a shrub native to Western Australia and is a member of the figwort family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Eremophila glabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Eremophila glabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
